title: zantedeschia rehmannii
intro: Zantedeschia rehmannii, also known as the Zantedeschia or Arum Lily, is a flowering plant species in the Arum family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Zantedeschia rehmannii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Zantedeschia rehmannii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
